sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE DICTIONARY test_dict (id UInt32, description String) PRIMARY KEY id SOURCE(SELECT id, description FROM test_table) LIFETIME(0);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'A%');
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Charlie' WHERE id = 1;
